resources.string:
How to use:

1. Make sure your heart rate strap is paired
 (Garmin Connect, etc.)

2. Wear the strap & wet the electrodes

3. Tap "Start Monitoring"

4. Go to YouTube — the overlay appears
 in the top-right corner

Tips:
• Wet electrodes before wearing
• Close other apps using the strap
• Drag the overlay to move it
• Tap the notification Stop to end
